description: A pair of round-toed black and brown flats with slip-on and low-top stylingPU upper with overlays, stitched and cut-out details, has a strap on the forefoot that extends to dual vertical tabs attached to an elasticated strap on the midfoot, connected to a heel collarCushioned and textured footbed with stitched detail, has branding on the heelTextured outsole with patterned groovesWarranty: 3 months against manufacturing defects only (not valid on products under discount or promotional offer)
